title: Spell check in dashboard text widgets

posts.author: Harry.Connolly (Harry Connolly)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

My organisation uses Monday.com as a customer-facing project management tool. We rely heavily on dashboards to report both externally and internally, extracting information from specific boards—such as those maintained by project managers—for programme-level oversight.

Each project manager updates their individual project board, which then feeds into a central portfolio board and reporting dashboard. As part of this setup, I’ve designed dashboards to include a text widget where programme managers can summarise weekly highlights and challenges.

We’ve received multiple requests from the project team to enable a spell check feature within these text widgets. This would help ensure clarity and professionalism in external-facing reports and improve overall communication quality.

What are you trying to achieve

Enable a spellcheck feature within text widgets.
